headerDisplay:
Homebridge plugin for PETLIBRO smart pet devices.

Before setup, review the [Account Management](https://github.com/jjjonesjr33/petlibro/wiki/PetLibro-Account-Management) and [Password Limitations](https://github.com/jjjonesjr33/petlibro/wiki/PetLibro-Password-Limitation) wiki pages — only one session can be logged in at a time, so consider creating a dedicated PETLIBRO account for Homebridge and sharing your devices to it.

password.title: PETLIBRO Account Password
password.description: Your account password. It will be MD5-hashed before being sent to the API.

pollIntervalSeconds.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollIntervalSeconds.description: How often to poll the PETLIBRO API for device state. Lower values increase responsiveness at the cost of more API calls.

manualFeedPortions.title: Manual Feed Portions
manualFeedPortions.description: Number of portions to dispense when the Manual Feed switch is triggered. 1 portion ≈ 1/12 cup on standard feeders.

debug.title: Debug Logging
debug.description: Enable verbose debug logs. Useful when reporting issues.
